name: Tilapia Veracruz
tagline: Tilapia braised in tomato-olive-caper sauce — Veracruz coast classic
highlight: Tomatoes, olives, capers — Spanish-Mexican coastal, no shellfish

hero.alt: Tilapia in red Veracruz sauce with olives and capers
hero.caption: veracruz — tomato, olive, caper

healthFacts: Tilapia is mild and lean — takes on whatever sauce surrounds it.
Olives + capers contribute polyphenols and salt without added sodium.

steps.title: Build the sauce
steps.detail: Heat olive oil in a wide pan. Sweat onion 6 min. Add garlic 1 min. Pour in tomatoes; simmer 8 min until thickened.
steps.tip: Cook off some of the canned tomato sharpness before adding fish.

steps.title: Olives, capers, jalapeño
steps.detail: Stir in olives, capers, jalapeños, bay leaf. Simmer 3 min.
steps.tip: Saltiness builds: taste before adding any extra salt.

media.alt: Olives and capers added to sauce
media.caption: olives, capers, jalapeño

steps.title: Nestle the fish
steps.detail: Salt tilapia. Slip fillets into the sauce. Spoon sauce over the tops. Cover, simmer 6–8 min until fish flakes.
steps.tip: Don't flip — the fish breaks. Just spoon sauce over.

steps.title: Cilantro and serve
steps.detail: Discard bay leaf. Scatter cilantro over the top. Serve with rice or warm tortillas.
steps.tip: A dose of lime over each portion sharpens the whole dish.
